message:
Polish navigation bar, button styling, and spotlight search UX

**Nav.tsx:**
- Refine Go Pro button: reduce magnetic strength (0.3 → 0.15), use subtle
  indigo glow instead of bright violet, simplify class list for cleaner
  hover states.
- Crown icon: change from amber to white to match the button's white text.
- SpotlightTrigger: pass hideText prop and adjust sizing for a cleaner
  icon-only appearance in the nav bar.
- Mobile drawer: switch Pro link from generic text-primary to explicit
  text-indigo-600/dark:text-indigo-400 for consistent brand color across
  light and dark themes.

**MagneticButton.tsx:**
- Simplify the primary variant: replace the indigo-to-violet gradient with
  a flat indigo-600 (dark: indigo-500) background. Swap the heavy colored
  shadow for a subtle structural shadow. Add explicit hover states
  (indigo-700 / indigo-400) for clear interactive feedback. The result is
  a cleaner, more modern button that doesn't compete visually with content.

**SpotlightSearch.tsx:**
- Add a 2-second timeout for semantic reranking via Promise.race. If the
  reranker takes longer than 2s (e.g., slow network to the embedding API),
  return BM25 results immediately rather than making the user wait. This
  prevents the spotlight from feeling sluggish on slow connections.
- Add hideText prop to SpotlightTrigger: when true, renders only the search
  icon without the "Search..." label text, used by the nav bar for a
  compact icon-only trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
